R0249.title: CDN Cache Poisoning
R0249.definition: Attackers poison cached content through cache-key confusion, header pollution, or edge-rule defects.
R0249.description: Attackers poison cached content through cache-key confusion, header pollution, or edge-rule defects.
R0249.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
